title: Japanese Inari Zushi
description: A traditional Japanese dish made with sweetened tofu pouches and sushi rice. Inari zushi is a popular snack at Japanese festivals and markets.
instructions: Rinse the sushi rice and cook according to package instructions.
Prepare the inari by cutting off the stems and rinsing the pouches.
In a small saucepan, combine the mirin and date syrup.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the syrup has thickened slightly.
Add the cooked sushi rice to a large bowl and pour the mirin-date syrup mixture over the top.
Stir the rice gently to combine.
Stuff each inari pouch with a portion of the sushi rice mixture.
